hypothesis: Under a fixed 7200 s total reactor-time budget, a heterogeneous swarm of independently prompted LLM agents with diverse model temperatures and randomized precursor order, coordinated by a summarizing supervisor that penalizes redundant trials, will achieve greater coverage of expert-labeled UMAP reaction regimes and a higher rate of discovering self-limiting ALD/ALE cycles in configuration II without QCM-range priors than a single agent.
